extension.description: 一键管理 VS Code、Git、npm 和集成终端的代理设置。
command.toggleShowProxyUrl: otak: 切换代理 URL 显示
config.proxyUrl: 用于 VS Code、Git、npm 以及集成终端代理设置的代理服务器 URL（例如：http://proxy.example.com:8080）
config.pollingInterval: 自动模式轮询间隔（秒，10-300）。用于检查系统代理变化的频率。
config.detectionSourcePriority: 代理检测来源的优先顺序。按顺序尝试，直到有一个成功。
config.maxRetries: 代理检测失败时的最大重试次数。
config.testInterval: 代理连接测试间隔（秒，仅自动模式）。范围：30-600 秒。默认：60 秒。
config.autoTestEnabled: 在自动模式下启用自动代理连接测试。启用后会定期测试代理连通性。
config.enableFallback: 在未检测到系统代理时回退到手动代理（仅自动模式）。启用后，如果未检测到系统代理，扩展将尝试使用手动配置的代理作为回退。
config.enableFallback.description: 启用后，在自动模式下如果未检测到系统代理，扩展将尝试使用手动配置的代理作为回退。
config.showProxyUrl: 在状态栏中显示代理 URL
config.statusBarTooltip: Show the detailed status bar hover tooltip. otak-proxy status bar items are left-aligned so right-side VS Code notifications stay visible.
config.syncEnabled: 启用多个 VSCode/Cursor 实例之间的同步。启用后，代理设置将在所有实例之间共享。
config.syncInterval: 同步检查间隔（毫秒，100-5000）。用于检查来自其他实例的更改的频率。
prompt.initialSetup: 你想如何配置代理设置？
prompt.noManualProxy: 未配置手动代理。现在设置吗？
prompt.couldNotDetect: 无法检测到系统代理。要手动设置吗？
prompt.proxyWorks: 代理可用！你想如何使用它？
warning.noSystemProxyDetected: 未检测到系统代理。正在切换到关闭模式。
warning.noSystemProxyCheck: 未检测到系统代理。请检查系统/浏览器代理设置。
warning.unableToPersist: 无法持久化代理设置。VS Code 重启后设置将丢失。
warning.detectionFailed: 系统代理检测失败。你可以手动配置代理。
warning.detectionFailedRetries: 多次重试后系统代理检测仍失败。请检查系统/浏览器代理设置。
warning.invalidFormat: 检测到的系统代理格式无效：{url}
error.invalidProxyUrl: 代理 URL 格式无效
error.invalidProxyUrlDetected: 检测到的代理 URL 格式无效
error.configureUrlFailed: 配置代理 URL 失败
validation.proxyUrl.empty: 代理 URL 不能为空
validation.proxyUrl.shellMetacharacters: 代理 URL 包含危险的 shell 元字符
validation.proxyUrl.hostnameInvalid: 主机名包含无效字符（仅允许字母数字、点和连字符）
validation.proxyUrl.protocol: 协议必须是 http:// 或 https://
validation.proxyUrl.portRange: 端口必须在 1 到 65535 之间
validation.proxyUrl.usernameInvalid: 用户名包含无效字符（仅允许字母数字、连字符、下划线和 @）
validation.proxyUrl.passwordInvalid: 密码包含无效字符（仅允许字母数字、连字符、下划线和 @）
suggestion.verifyUrl: 确认代理 URL 是否正确
suggestion.checkServer: 检查代理服务器是否正在运行且可访问
suggestion.checkNetwork: 确保你的网络允许代理连接
suggestion.checkFirewall: 确认防火墙设置未阻止代理
suggestion.reconfigureManual: 尝试重新配置代理 URL
suggestion.checkSystemSettings: 检查系统/浏览器代理设置
suggestion.testDifferentApp: 用其他应用测试代理以确认其可用
suggestion.includeProtocol: 请包含协议（http:// 或 https://）
suggestion.validHostname: 确保主机名仅包含字母数字、点和连字符
suggestion.checkOutputLog: 查看输出日志获取详细信息
suggestion.invalidFormatDetected: 检测到的系统代理格式无效
suggestion.configureManualInstead: 尝试改为配置手动代理
suggestion.verifyServerRunning: 确认代理服务器正在运行

suggestion.git.checkInstallationAndPermi: 检查 Git 安装和权限

suggestion.vscode.checkSettingsPermissio: 检查 VS Code 设置权限
suggestion.vscode.restartAndRetry: 重启 VS Code 后重试
suggestion.vscode.runWithPermissions: 使用适当权限运行 VS Code

suggestion.generic.checkDetails: 检查上面的错误详细信息
config.diagnosticsEnabled: Enable read-only proxy diagnostics after state changes and when running the diagnose command.
config.automaticRemediationEnabled: Enable safe automatic proxy remediation such as bounded delayed retry and drift detection. Disruptive actions still require confirmation.
config.hostUserLockEnabled: Use cross-window locks before writing host/user proxy targets such as Git, npm, VS Code, and terminal environment mutators.
config.automaticRetryEnabled: Allow one bounded delayed retry when a proxy apply operation fails and the failure is eligible for automatic remediation.
config.remediationDelayedRetryMs: Delay before an automatic remediation retry in milliseconds.
config.remediationFlapWindowMs: Time window used to detect repeated proxy remediation failures for the same issue fingerprint.
config.remediationFlapMaxAttempts: Maximum automatic remediation attempts allowed for one issue fingerprint within the flap detection window.
config.remediationFlapCooldownMs: Cooldown applied after repeated remediation failures for the same issue fingerprint.
config.notificationCooldownMs: Minimum interval before showing another notification for the same proxy diagnostic issue.
config.slowDiagnosticsTtlMs: TTL for slow proxy diagnostics such as spawned Git, npm, or Windows commands.
config.terminalOffMaskingEnabled: When proxy mode is Off, mask inherited proxy variables for newly created integrated terminals by replacing them with empty values.
config.notificationLevel: Controls how aggressively otak-proxy shows diagnostic notifications. Details are always available from the diagnose command.
config.windowsActionsEnabled: Allow user-approved Windows proxy actions. Read-only Windows diagnostics do not require this setting.
config.credentialTargetPolicy: Controls whether otak-proxy may write authenticated proxy URLs to plaintext target config files. Secrets are still stored in VS Code SecretStorage where possible.
config.legacyEnvFirstAutoDetection: Keep the v2-compatible Auto detection order that checks process environment proxy variables before current platform settings.
remediation.notification.applyFailed: Proxy settings did not fully apply. otak-proxy recorded sanitized diagnostics.
remediation.notification.issueDetected: Proxy diagnostics found a setting that may require your attention.
remediation.notification.lockSkipped: Another otak-proxy window is already applying proxy settings. This window skipped the write.
remediation.notification.credentialConse: This proxy URL contains credentials. Applying it may write credentials to plaintext target config files such as settings.json, .gitconfig, or .npmrc.
windowsAction.notWindows: Windows proxy actions are only available on a local Windows extension host.
windowsAction.disabled: Windows proxy actions are disabled. Enable otakProxy.windowsActionsEnabled to use this command.
windowsAction.resetWinHttpConfirm: Reset the WinHTTP proxy for this Windows user context? This may affect tools that use WinHTTP.
diagnose.noIssues: 代理诊断完成：未发现问题。
diagnose.summaryNoPrimary: 代理诊断发现 {issues}。详情请参阅 Otak Proxy Diagnostics。
diagnose.summary: 代理诊断发现 {issues}：{label} - {reason}{extra}。详情请参阅 Otak Proxy Diagnostics。
diagnose.target.vscodeLaunchArgv: VS Code 启动代理标志
diagnose.reason.managedProxyResidual: 代理应被禁用，但仍配置了代理
diagnose.reason.managedProxyMismatch: 配置的代理与预期的活动代理不匹配
diagnose.reason.childProcessUnavailable: 无法在此扩展主机中检查 Git/npm 配置
diagnose.reason.windowsUnavailable: 无法从此扩展主机检查 Windows 代理状态
diagnose.reason.proxySupportOff: VS Code 代理支持已禁用
diagnose.reason.launchProxyFlags: VS Code 是使用与代理相关的进程标志启动的
diagnose.reason.inheritedProxyEnv: 新终端可能会继承代理环境变量
diagnose.reason.existingTerminals: 现有终端会保留其旧的代理环境
diagnose.reason.effectiveOverride: Git 存在生效的代理覆盖
diagnose.reason.npmNoproxy: 配置了 npm noproxy，可能会绕过代理
diagnose.reason.winhttpParseUnavailable: 无法解析 WinHTTP 代理输出
diagnose.reason.wininetPac: 配置了代理自动配置 (PAC) URL
diagnose.reason.gitReadUnavailable: 无法读取 git 配置
migration.credentialsDropped: 在升级到 v3 期间，otak-proxy 无法将 {count} 个重复的代理凭据迁移到安全存储。如果代理停止验证，请重新输入。
